nasb.text: He made him ride on the high places of the earth, And he ate the produce of the field; And He made him suck honey from the rock, And oil from the flinty rock,

esv.text: He made him ride on the high places of the land, and he ate the produce of the field, and he suckled him with honey out of the rock, and oil out of the flinty rock.

cnv.text: 耶和華使他乘駕地的高處， 得吃田間的土產； 又使他從巖石中吸蜜， 從堅固的磐石中取油。

ccb.text: 耶和华使他们驰骋在大地的高处， 吃田间的五谷， 磐石中的蜂蜜， 石头地产的油；
